Transparency.implementation: Model Card, SHAP explanations, PDP and ICE visualizations.

Explainability.implementation: Counterfactual explanations, SHAP feature importance and interaction analysis.

Human Oversight.implementation: Predictions are intended to support—not replace—human decision making.

Model Validation.implementation: Performance evaluated using MAE, RMSE and R² on a holdout test set.

Reproducibility.implementation: Random seeds, version-controlled source code and saved trained models.

Data Governance.implementation: Project currently uses synthetic data for development and experimentation.

Fairness Monitoring.implementation: Future work: evaluate subgroup performance and bias metrics before production deployment.
